field.name: ma_dvcs
field.check: ma_dvcs not in (select ma_dvcs from dmdvcs where status = '1')⩓ma_dvcs in (select distinct ma_dvcs from dmdvcsks where year(ngay_ks) >= @year)⩓not exists(select 1 from lkvv b where @@table.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and @@table.tk = b.tk and @@table.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and b.nam = @year) and @@table.ma_dvcs not in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @user and r_new = 1)⩓exists(select 1 from lkvv b where @@table.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and @@table.tk = b.tk and @@table.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and b.nam = @year) and @@table.ma_dvcs not in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @user and r_edit = 1)

field.name: tk
field.check: tk not in (select tk_lkvv from dmtklkvv)

field.name: ma_vv
field.check: ma_vv not in (select ma_vv from dmvv)

processing.text:
declare @q nvarchar(4000), @message nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @user int, @admin bit, @unit varchar(32), @year int, @r int, @inputYearOpening bit select @admin = @@admin, @user = @@userID, @unit = @@unit, @year = nam_bd from dmstt select @inputYearOpening = case when month(ngay_ky1) = month(ngay_dn2) and day(ngay_ky1) = day(ngay_dn2) then 0 else 1 end from dmstt
if @admin <> 1 begin if @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@admin, @user, 'JobAccumulationBalance', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end end
-- Checking &Checking;
if @inputYearOpening = 0 begin update @@table set lk_no_dk = 0, lk_co_dk = 0, lk_no_dk_nt = 0, lk_co_dk_nt = 0 end
if @type = '0' delete @@table from @@table a where exists(select 1 from lkvv b where a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and a.tk = b.tk and a.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and b.nam = @year)
select a.* into #k from @@table a join lkvv b on a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and a.tk = b.tk and a.ma_vv = b.ma_vv where b.nam = @year delete @@table from @@table a where exists(select 1 from #k b where a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and a.tk = b.tk and a.ma_vv = b.ma_vv)
-- Insert &Inserting; -- Update if @type = '1' begin &Updating; where a.nam = @year end
